kinesisanalyticsv2.application.catalogco: The configuration parameters for the default Amazon Glue database. You use this database for SQL queries that you write in a Kinesis Data Analytics Studio notebook.

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.catalogco.Description: The configuration parameters for the default Amazon Glue database. You use this database for Apache Flink SQL queries and table API transforms that you write in a Kinesis Data Analytics Studio notebook.
